title: IntegArtifactDef - Metadata API
wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="IntegArtifactDef">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="description" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="displayName" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="groupId" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="iconName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="isGlobal" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="Metadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fullName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
```
